question.label: Alignment move
question.name: What would better cross-team alignment look like in the next few weeks?
question.description: Ends on an open, action-shaping commitment tied to friction reduction and follow-through.

answer: Specific feedback checkpoints during projects would help me level up faster.

assessment.note: Names missing feedback checkpoints as the absent support she needs for better alignment and faster growth; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'Specific feedback checkpoints during projects' should be picked up next session.

history.answer_excerpt: Specific feedback checkpoints during projects would help me level up faster.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I get work done, yet I am not consistently shaping decisions early.
Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.
I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.
That slows trust because stakeholders feel surprised late.
I need a tighter narrative on tradeoffs, not just stronger models.
I want to lead one cross-team decision this cycle, end to end.
